summary: Explains how Cavallo CLB (Cute Little Boot) mini hoof boots protect driving miniature horses, covering TPU sole grip, padded comfort collar, break-in, and shock absorption.
Argues for using Cavallo hoof boots during trailering to prevent lower-limb travel injuries, improve traction, and absorb vibration; includes a customer's Transport Air video.
Roundup of customer testimonials praising Cavallo hoof boots (Trek, Simple) on mules and horses across varied terrain, with photos and feedback.
Customer testimonial about an 18-year-old Paint with navicular improving and prancing after switching to Cavallo boots, plus praise for customer service and free Comfort Sleeves.
Customer testimonial from owner of Ollie the Horse (UK) on Cavallo Trek boots performing across mud, water, gravel and varied terrain at all gaits with good drainage and fit.
Customer testimonial about a cart horse named Rowdy with thin soles whose stride improved after using CLB mini hoof boots and Comfort Pads.
Customer testimonial about lime-green Cavallo Trek boots fitting a mare and a navicular gelding well across hilly, rocky, wet terrain, with praise for the deal and gifts.
Story of a rescued mini horse named KimChi injured shortly after gelding, and Cavallo's help (Wendy) supporting his recovery; an emotional customer narrative with photos.
Customer testimonial about a mini named Valentine returning to the cart after two years of laminitis, aided by CLB boots and yellow Comfort Pads.
Announcement that Cavallo Worldwide Ambassador Emma Massingale was nominated for a 2019 JustGiving Creative Fundraiser award for her Europe cycling trip benefiting Brooke; includes a video.
Educational article on balancing minerals (magnesium, copper, zinc, selenium, chromium) for hoof health, framing the hoof as a circulatory pump and warning about deficiencies and imbalances.
Customer testimonial on using Cavallo Simple and Trek boots on multi-use park trails to avoid trail damage from shod horses and ride more confidently across BC terrain.
